title: Garlicky Creamy Filipino Garlic Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly meal-prep dish featuring brown sugar and garlic to create a creamy yet tangy flavor profile, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat, add olive oil and sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add sliced onions and cook for about 2 minutes or until they start to soften.
Place the seasoned chicken thighs in the pan and spoon brown sugar over them evenly. Cover with aluminum foil.
Bake in preheated oven for approximately 15-20 minutes, depending on the thickness of the chicken pieces.
Once done, remove from heat, drizzle with lime juice, then let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot and enjoy your Garlicky Creamy Filipino Garlic Stir-fry!
